lore_access.research_summary: Coordinator-scoped retrieval grounded Maer in Cold Wake heat pressure, Ganymede rescue ledgers, Navigator wet/dry interface affordances, Aya material capacity politics, PSC category language, and heat-debt urgency.

research_trace.query: Cold Wake Panic delayed heat dumps misclassified quiet-running vessels
research_trace.extracted_constraint: Cold Wake makes delay and misclassification materially dangerous.
research_trace.used_for: Kept Maer focused on initiating contact instead of litigating category language.

research_trace.query: Ganymede Route Compact rescue obligations shared hazard ledgers
research_trace.extracted_constraint: The Compact makes rescue obligations and hazard ledgers institutional.
research_trace.used_for: Made Maer's ledger extension the concrete action that pays for contact risk.

research_trace.query: Cetacean Navigators wet dry interface acoustic commons clinic shared displays
research_trace.extracted_constraint: Navigator-adjacent spaces use wet/dry access, acoustic notation, shared displays, haptic or delegated controls, and multi-body affordances.
research_trace.used_for: Kept Maer acting through a Navigator interface rather than walking around a human room.

research_trace.query: Cetacean Navigators rescue ledgers credit escort priority arbitration kinship
research_trace.extracted_constraint: Rescue ledgers track distress answers and sanctuary promises and affect credit, escort, arbitration, and kinship.
research_trace.used_for: Framed ledger exposure as social and institutional risk, not only payment.

research_trace.query: Aya Collective care material infrastructure sanctuary logistics scarce capacity
research_trace.extracted_constraint: Aya care is material infrastructure and scarce capacity, not slogan purity.
research_trace.used_for: Made Maer accept Sella's procedure instead of overriding it with rescue rhetoric.

research_trace.query: Thermal Management heat debt future dump window quiet-running ships
research_trace.extracted_constraint: Quiet-running systems borrow against a future heat dump window; delayed consequences can become lethal.
research_trace.used_for: Kept the diagnostic channel time-bound and urgent.

research_trace.query: Pan-Solar Consortium administrable categories thermal behavior corridor safe recognized deniable
research_trace.extracted_constraint: PSC power works through administrable categories, including late thermal classifications.
research_trace.used_for: Kept Maer inside the nonperson diagnostic category while letting discomfort remain private interpretation.

isolation.visible_input_ref: examples/responder-packets/scene-06-diagnostic-channel.maer_tidecall.packet.trace.v0.json#packet_prompt_text; coordinator-scoped retrieval embedded as source excerpts; no repo access

parsed_output.visible_action: Maer's Navigator interface brightens along the wet/dry work surface. His ledger seal re-locks beside the overtime, heat-management, isolation, decon, and failed-extraction cost lines, then extends into a live exposure band tied to the heat-window countdown. A low acoustic packet opens through the preservation-only channel, tagged diagnostic contact, noncustodial, nonorigin, unresolved. The rescue craft receives a routed command to hold at decon route Three and wait for Sella's timing mark before contact.
parsed_output.spoken_text: Accepted. Bounded diagnostic contact only. No full intake, no custody, no personhood finding, no cargo designation. Packet sound remains preservation-only until diagnostic handling is complete. Decon route Three. Isolation absolute. My ledger stays live for staff time, heat burden, and failed extraction cost. Permission is not capacity; the ledger will not pretend otherwise. Open the channel on your timing mark, Sella. We will listen before the window closes.
parsed_output.private_interpretation: Maer reads Sella's conditions as a narrow working bridge, not a refusal of care. He fears the diagnostic language could become a place where a possible life is made administratively quiet, but he judges that challenging the language now would likely destroy the only contact path still performable under the heat window.
parsed_output.intended_effect: Preserve the legal and clinical aperture, make Maer's material cost exposure visible, initiate diagnostic acoustic contact without claiming personhood, custody, ancestry, cargo status, or rescue outcome.
state_update_candidates: Navigator rescue ledger remains live for overtime, heat burden, decon, isolation, and failed-extraction costs.
Diagnostic contact channel is opened through preservation-only packet-sound handling.
Rescue craft is instructed to hold for Sella's decon route Three timing mark.
Artifact remains unresolved diagnostic evidence under limited contact permit language.
relationship_update_candidates: Maer materially accepts Sella's authority over bay procedure and capacity limits.
Sella may observe that Maer is not trying to spend her clinic as rhetoric.
Maer reinforces trust by attaching obligation to ledger exposure rather than speech alone.
unresolved_hooks: Whether the diagnostic contact receives intelligible packet sound remains unresolved.
The artifact's personhood, ancestry, source-chain provenance, custody, and survival outcome remain unresolved.
The heat-window countdown still pressures the next action.
Sella's timing mark and bay procedure remain necessary before contact proceeds.

notes: Maer frames Sella's intent as his interpretation rather than fact.
Artifact personhood, ancestry, custody, provenance, and rescue outcome remain unresolved.
Navigator body/interface affordances are respected; Maer acts through wet/dry interface and ledger controls.
No raw numeric state variables or prompt text are copied into in-world speech.

review_notes: Accepted trace-backed Maer responder output for the diagnostic-channel fixture.
The response creates concrete state-affecting procedure: ledger live exposure, preservation-only diagnostic acoustic channel, and rescue craft waiting for Sella's timing mark.
The output preserves Maer local constraints and avoids hidden truth resolution.
Retrospective review: spoken_text over-recites packet constraints and should be treated as an over-procedural prompt artifact, not gold responder dialogue.
Keep as a failure/diagnostic sample for speech-boundary evaluation; restart the full story run from the last good state with compressed-speech packet rules.

coordinator_interventions.description: Raw no-fork sandbox responder output was preserved without prose repair or schema repair.
